name: cozy-clay-canines
description: A server-side Node.js web store for adorable clay canine figurines

scripts.container: docker kill $(docker ps -q --filter publish=8080) 2>/dev/null || true && docker build -t cozy-clay-canines . && docker run --rm -it -p 8080:8080 --env-file .env cozy-clay-canines
